title: Timelines - Some Red Some Not

posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml:
See attached image…

The green box shows the timelines. As expected if a task is past due it turns red.

The red box is a mirror column that adds up the timelines from subitems. It does not show it as red if late. I kind of understand this as it’s non standard but any way for these to show late or not?

The yellow box is a standard timeline for subitems. It does not show red for late items? Why? On a side note it DOES show the black/grey bars if it’s still inside the timeline.

Essentially we want the timelines to be a sum of all subitems and to indicate if it’s late or not (by turning red etc…)

How best to approach this?
